pr.title: Add Strategic Pillars, Sequencing Principles, and FY27 Phased Roadmap
pr.body:
## Summary
- Adds Strategic Pillars overview cards (3 pillars in grid)
- Adds Sequencing Guiding Principles (3 principles)
- Adds full FY27 Phased Roadmap (3 pillars x 4 quarters with all initiatives)
- Mirrors Unified Builder roadmap page structure
- All initiatives from Initiative Details mapped into Q1-Q4 with STARTS/SHIPS markers

## Test plan
- [ ] Open `cjb-workflow-health.html#strategy` and verify pillar cards, principles, and roadmap grid render
- [ ] Confirm all initiatives from detail tables appear in the roadmap grid


Made with [Cursor](https://cursor.com)
pr.author: deepakp1308
